queries.question: List all event planners and also show wedding coordinators employed by Events Unlimited.
queries.sql:
SELECT Event_Planner.Position
FROM Event_Planner JOIN Company ON Event_Planner.companyId = Company.id
UNION
SELECT Wedding_Coordinator.Position
FROM Wedding_Coordinator JOIN Company ON Wedding_Coordinator.companyId = Company.id
WHERE Company.name = "Events Unlimited"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?event_planner a :Event_Planner .
    ?company a :Companies .
    ?event_planner p:hasCompany ?company .
    ?event_planner p:Position ?position .
    BIND(?position AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?wedding_coordinator a :Wedding_Coordinator .
    ?company a :Companies .
    ?wedding_coordinator p:hasCompany ?company .
    ?wedding_coordinator p:Position ?position .
    ?company p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Events Unlimited")
    BIND(?position AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Which event planners and wedding coordinators work for Events Unlimited?
queries.sql:
SELECT Event_Planner.Position
FROM Event_Planner JOIN Company ON Event_Planner.companyId = Company.id
WHERE Company.name = "Events Unlimited"
UNION
SELECT Wedding_Coordinator.Position
FROM Wedding_Coordinator JOIN Company ON Wedding_Coordinator.companyId = Company.id
WHERE Company.name = "Events Unlimited"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display event planners and wedding coordinators from Events Unlimited.
